message:
fix(ci): add external dependency checkouts to release workflow

The release workflow would fail on GitHub Actions because all 5 release
targets (fwc, fcp-anthropic, fcp-discord, fcp-openai, fcp-telegram)
depend on asupersync and toon_rust via local path references
(../../../asupersync, ../../../toon_rust). These sibling repos are not
checked out by the default actions/checkout step.

Added shallow git clones of both external deps in all three build jobs
(build, build-connectors, publish) with shell: bash for Windows compat.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -55,6 +55,11 @@ jobs:
             asset: fwc-windows-amd64
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - name: Checkout external dependencies
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync.git "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE/../asupersync"
+          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/toon_rust.git "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE/../toon_rust"
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
         with:
           targets: ${{ matrix.target }}
@@ -117,6 +122,11 @@ jobs:
             suffix: windows-amd64
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - name: Checkout external dependencies
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync.git "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE/../asupersync"
+          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/toon_rust.git "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE/../toon_rust"
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
         with:
           targets: ${{ matrix.target }}
@@ -257,6 +267,11 @@ jobs:
     if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/')
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - name: Checkout external dependencies
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync.git "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE/../asupersync"
+          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/toon_rust.git "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE/../toon_rust"
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
 
       - name: Publish crates (dry-run)
